FlowForm Studio PRO v0.2.0 turns the visual prototype into a durable full-stack
workflow system.

## Highlights

- PostgreSQL-backed sandbox aggregate with optimistic revisions and compare-and-swap
  aggregate updates
- Atomic audit entries, attachment metadata, and transactional outbox events
- Redis and BullMQ delivery with authenticated Socket.IO rooms and event deduplication
- Runtime-validated HTTP and realtime contracts shared across the monorepo
- React server-state integration with autosave, visible conflict resolution, and no
  client-side simulation of publication or approval
- Backpressure-aware PDF and image uploads with file signatures, SHA-256 checksums,
  private MinIO storage, rollback, and sandbox cleanup
- Structured request IDs, errors, liveness, readiness, and graceful shutdown
- NestJS HTTP integration and Playwright recruiter-journey coverage
- Database migrations at container startup and PostgreSQL-backed GitHub Actions

## Relay semantics

Durable mutations and their outbox records commit atomically. Server relay attempts
may repeat. Browser delivery is best effort, so clients deduplicate event IDs and
reload canonical API state. This release intentionally makes no exactly-once claim.

## Runtime

The complete Docker Compose topology includes PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO, NestJS,
the React PWA, and Caddy. Recruiter sandboxes remain isolated and expire after 24
hours.
